failedAssertions.reason: Swap amount input still resolves to GeistMono (monospace) while validation requires proportional sans-serif for prices/stat values/amounts.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Frontend API endpoints (/candles, /market, /depth, /trades) repeatedly returned HTTP 429, leaving chart in fallback/error state and preventing full validation of normal rendered chart borderless behavior.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented setup fallback: when `next dev` hits EMFILE and serves only /_not-found, use `pnpm build && pnpm exec next start --port 3102` for UI validation.
